states.name: Vesh
states.title: Will of the Soil
states.description: After bearing the wanton destruction wrought by the forces of the Eternal for several cycles, the soils of Erden stirred. Determined to rid themselves of the disease known as the Pandemonium, they created Vesh. Born from the earth itself, Vesh was brought forth in the height of an endless trial. It knows nothing of itself, and even the planet that bore it knows not its future.

states.name: Vesh
states.title: Will of the Soil
states.description: From the moment it was created, Vesh has continued an endless quest to define itself. Through encounters both friendly and hostile it developed a personality, and arrived at a personal philosophy of sorts. It began its journey without words, but through interaction with the inhabitants of Erden, it taught itself to speak. Though it makes no effort to explain its actions, many have been saved by the swiftness of its spear.

states.name: Vesh
states.title: Will of the Soil
states.description: Vesh was created to end the Pandemonium. However, it has no concept of good or evil. It merely fights because that is what it was made for, and because it believes that achieving this objective will bring it closer to the single desire it holds in its heart—to return, someday, to the beloved soil it treks across.
